demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.general_idea: Add Windows-specific curl commands using curl.exe to ensure cross-platform compatibility for service verification instructions.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.human_impl: Added a 'Windows' section with `curl.exe` commands alongside the existing 'Linux / macOS' section.

demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.general_idea: Add curl command examples formatted for Windows Command Prompt to improve cross-platform documentation.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.human_impl: Added section '### Windows (cmd.exe)' with curl.exe commands using REM comments and escaped quotes.

demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.general_idea: Add curl command examples formatted for Windows PowerShell to improve cross-platform documentation.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.human_impl: Added section '### Windows (PowerShell)' with curl.exe commands using backticks for line continuation and single-quoted JSON.

demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.general_idea: Add curl command examples formatted for Windows Command Prompt to improve cross-platform documentation.
demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.human_impl: Added section '### Windows (cmd.exe)' with curl.exe commands using REM comments and double-quoted JSON.

demos/modulo1-introduccion/microservicio.general_idea: Add curl command examples formatted for Windows PowerShell to improve cross-platform documentation.
